ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "show_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the show (e.g., s1, s2) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., Movie, TV Show) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "cast" TEXT /* List of cast members (comma-separated) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the content was added to the platform */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the content was released */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the content (e.g., TV-MA, PG-13) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the content (e.g., 94 min) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the content poster image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the content trailer */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Is the content available for streaming? */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Is the content featured on the platform? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_genres" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "is_primary_genre" INTEGER /* Is this the primary genre for the content? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, content creator, viewer) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Permission level of the role (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_content_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the content was viewed */,
  "view_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the view in seconds */,
  "watched_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of the content watched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_content_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_content_views_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Rating value given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text review provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_ratings_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the content */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the content was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the content was approved or rejected */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_submissions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Detailed change log for this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_localizations" (
  "localization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each localization */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the localization */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the localization */,
  "localized_title" TEXT /* Localized title of the content */,
  "localized_description" TEXT /* Localized description of the content */,
  "localized_poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the localized poster image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("localization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_localizations_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended content */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was generated */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used to generate the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_recommendations_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plan */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the plan */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the plan (in months) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Is the plan active? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription started */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription expires */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES payment_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tags_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_categories_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the transcript */,
  "transcript_text" TEXT /* Text of the transcript */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_transcripts_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)
